parameters.query:
=SELECT id, ref_code, expires_at
FROM public.sf_ad_clicks
WHERE clinic_id = '{{ $json.clinicId }}'
  AND expires_at > NOW()
  AND (
    ({{ $json.gclid !== null ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE' }} AND gclid = NULLIF('{{ $json.gclid }}', 'null'))
    OR
    ({{ $json.fbclid !== null ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE' }} AND fbclid = NULLIF('{{ $json.fbclid }}', 'null'))
  )
LIMIT 1

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ref_code: $json.existingRefCode, attribution_id: $json.existingId, expires_at: $json.existingExpiresAt, reused: true }) }}

parameters.query:
=-- Try inserting with first candidate; ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING skips quietly
-- Returns row if successful, empty if collision
INSERT INTO public.sf_ad_clicks (
  clinic_id, ref_code, gclid, fbclid,
  utm_source, utm_medium, utm_campaign, utm_content, utm_term, landing_page
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.clinicId }}',
  '{{ $json.candidates[0] }}',
  NULLIF('{{ $json.gclid }}', 'null'),
  NULLIF('{{ $json.fbclid }}', 'null'),
  NULLIF('{{ $json.utmSource }}', 'null'),
  NULLIF('{{ $json.utmMedium }}', 'null'),
  NULLIF('{{ $json.utmCampaign }}', 'null'),
  NULLIF('{{ $json.utmContent }}', 'null'),
  NULLIF('{{ $json.utmTerm }}', 'null'),
  NULLIF('{{ $json.landingPage }}', 'null')
)
ON CONFLICT (clinic_id, ref_code) DO NOTHING
RETURNING id, ref_code, expires_at

=INSERT INTO public.sf_ad_clicks (
  clinic_id, ref_code, gclid, fbclid,
  utm_source, utm_medium, utm_campaign, utm_content, utm_term, landing_page
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.clinicId }}',
  '{{ $json.candidates[1] }}',
  NULLIF('{{ $json.gclid }}', 'null'),
  NULLIF('{{ $json.fbclid }}', 'null'),
  NULLIF('{{ $json.utmSource }}', 'null'),
  NULLIF('{{ $json.utmMedium }}', 'null'),
  NULLIF('{{ $json.utmCampaign }}', 'null'),
  NULLIF('{{ $json.utmContent }}', 'null'),
  NULLIF('{{ $json.utmTerm }}', 'null'),
  NULLIF('{{ $json.landingPage }}', 'null')
)
ON CONFLICT (clinic_id, ref_code) DO NOTHING
RETURNING id, ref_code, expires_at

=INSERT INTO public.sf_ad_clicks (
  clinic_id, ref_code, gclid, fbclid,
  utm_source, utm_medium, utm_campaign, utm_content, utm_term, landing_page
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.clinicId }}',
  '{{ $json.candidates[2] }}',
  NULLIF('{{ $json.gclid }}', 'null'),
  NULLIF('{{ $json.fbclid }}', 'null'),
  NULLIF('{{ $json.utmSource }}', 'null'),
  NULLIF('{{ $json.utmMedium }}', 'null'),
  NULLIF('{{ $json.utmCampaign }}', 'null'),
  NULLIF('{{ $json.utmContent }}', 'null'),
  NULLIF('{{ $json.utmTerm }}', 'null'),
  NULLIF('{{ $json.landingPage }}', 'null')
)
ON CONFLICT (clinic_id, ref_code) DO NOTHING
RETURNING id, ref_code, expires_at

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ error: 'ref_code_collision', message: 'All 3 code candidates were taken. Retry request.' }) }}
